_comment: Copy to .claude/settings.local.json (gitignored). Replace <HOME> and add your own allowlist. The SessionStart hook snapshots your private journal before each session.

hooks.command: mkdir -p "$HOME/Documents/Coding/trading/journal-history" && cp "$HOME/Desktop/Trading-Journal.md" "$HOME/Documents/Coding/trading/journal-history/$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).md" 2>/dev/null; echo 'SOURCE OF TRUTH: ~/Desktop/Trading-Journal.md — read §0 STATE + §9d before ANY account action.'
